Cases.description: Number of esophageal cancer cases by tobacco use group. Together with Noncases, these form the 2x2 contingency table used to compute the odds ratio.

Noncases.description: Number of noncases (controls) by tobacco use group. Together with Cases, these form the 2x2 contingency table used to compute the odds ratio.

Tobacco.description: Tobacco use dichotomized at 20 grams/day, serving as the exposure (risk factor) variable in the case-control study.
